entity.summary: Solana decentralized-finance trading protocol whose current exchange core is the GAMMA automated market maker, including dynamic fees, permissionless pools, and hybrid concentrated-liquidity routing.
entity.notes: Current first-party documentation states that GooseFX's core offering is GAMMA, an AMM on Solana, and explicitly says earlier single-sided liquidity pools, perpetual futures, and the NFT aggregator were sunsetted. HEI therefore records the current entity as an active DEX centered on GAMMA rather than preserving the retired product surfaces as separate entities.

evidence.title: Welcome to GooseFX
evidence.notes: Current first-party documentation identifies GooseFX as a Solana DeFi hub centered on the GAMMA AMM and states that earlier perpetual futures and other products were sunsetted to focus on the core GAMMA offering.

evidence.title: GooseFX GAMMA v2 Hybrid CLMM
evidence.notes: First-party documentation updated within the prior year describes GAMMA v2 hybrid CPAMM/CLMM routing, dynamic fees, pool management, swap execution, and liquidity optimization.

evidence.title: GooseFX DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: Secondary DEX registry corroborates GooseFX exchange identity; first-party documentation remains the current-state and product-boundary authority.
